candidates.why: Revenue-related component, but only a residual component and not full top-line.
Revenue component from own operations, but not total company revenue.
Explicit total top-line revenue/sales line and best match for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Expense line, not revenue.
COGS line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: A cost component within cost of revenues, but not the full COGS line.
Explicit cost of revenues / COGS total and best match for direct operating costs.
Could be overhead in some firms, but here likely mixed with operating/service delivery costs and not clearly SG&A-only.
Clear administrative overhead component; strong SG&A match.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A-related wording, but depreciation must be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Chose the clearest non-depreciation overhead component. Excluded depreciation per instructions and did not use subtotals/balancing rows.
No R&D line appears to be present in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable fallback if a more specific interest expense line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense, interest rate derivatives measured at fair value
candidates.why: Derivative-related interest/fair value item, too narrow/specific for primary XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only, not the main interest expense line.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the specific interest expense line first, with broader financial expenses as fallback for periods where the specific line is absent.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when parent equity is available.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Selected parent/owners equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Profit for the year attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet line for minority interest / NCI.
Equivalent balance sheet label; good fallback if naming changes.
Income statement attribution total, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; BE uses parent equity so this avoids double counting.
